Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SB Anzu 1

11⸢bi⸣-in šar da-ad-mi šu-pa-a na-ram d⸢ma⸣-mi
22gaš-ru lu-u-za-mur DINGIR bu-kur₂ ⸢d⸣[EN].LIL₂
33⸢d⸣NIN.URTA šu-pa-a na-ram dma-mi
